name: Lemon-Pineapple Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve about a dozen vanilla wafers for the back crust. Finely crush the remaining cookies. Pack the crushed cookies into a 9-inch pie pan and press them around the edge of the pan to form the back crust.
2. In a large bowl, combine the CoolWhip, lemon pie filling [prepared], and drained pineapple until uniformly blended. Pour the mixture into the pie shell, leaving no air pockets.
3. Place in the freezer for at least 2 to 3 hours before serving. Remove at least 45 minutes prior to serving.
4. Garnish with chunk pineapple and lemon zest. Slice and serve.
Note: Any type of prepared citrus pie filling can be used as long as it is not hot or warm when blending with the CoolWhip.
